emotion: Sophisticated, warm, confident, intimate rooftop luxury.

motion.scroll_reveal: fade-in-up with intersection observer, duration 700ms, ease-out
motion.hover_card: border-gold/50 glow effect, subtle translate-y-[-4px] transition-all duration-300
motion.parallax: subtle background-attachment fixed or framer-motion scroll-y transform

navbar.cta_button: border border-[#C9A96E] text-[#C9A96E] hover:bg-[#C9A96E] hover:text-[#0D0A07] transition-colors px-6 py-2 rounded-none

hero.content: H1 tag with 'Where Every Evening Ascends', followed by subtle scroll indicator.

ambiance_gallery.layout: bento grid (4 images), mixing tall and wide aspect ratios
ambiance_gallery.image_behavior: w-full h-full object-cover scale-100 hover:scale-[1.03] transition-transform duration-700

menu_section.styling: TabsList transparent, TabTrigger border-b-2 border-transparent data-[state=active]:border-[#C9A96E] data-[state=active]:text-[#C9A96E] text-[#F0E6D3]
menu_section.cards: bg-[#1A1410] border border-white/5 hover:border-[#C9A96E]/40 transition-colors p-6 rounded-none

cocktail_spotlight.image: tall portrait layout for the Rejuvenate cocktail, subtle gold border

about_us.pills: inline-block border border-[#7A4C35] text-[#F0E6D3] px-4 py-1 text-sm rounded-full mr-3 mb-3
about_us.visit_strip: mt-16 bg-[#1A1410] p-8 md:p-12 flex flex-col md:flex-row justify-between items-center border border-white/5

footer.layout: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 gap-12 py-16 border-t border-white/10

hero_background.description: Rooftop golden hues at dusk for parallax hero

instructions_to_main_agent: Use pure HTML and Tailwind for marketing layout structures.
Install and use Google Fonts (Cormorant Garamond, DM Sans, Playfair Display SC) in the index.html or global CSS.
Implement lucide-react for icons (map pin, phone, etc).
Map all colors to Tailwind config.
Add 'data-testid' to all buttons, navigation links, and Tabs.
Use standard <a> tags with 'tel:' and 'https://wa.me/' hrefs for the Reserve CTA and Phone numbers.
Keep animations elegant and restrained; use framer-motion sparingly for fade-in-ups or use standard CSS + IntersectionObserver.
Ensure the design remains strictly Dark Theme (Archetype 5) with high contrast for text legibility.
Cards should NOT have rounded corners; maintain sharp, sophisticated edges (rounded-none).
